name: Maryland Chicken Cakes
recipeIngredient: 1 cup Cracker crumbs (saltines or whole wheat crackers)
1/2 tsp Salt (garlic salt can be used as a substitute)
recipeInstructions:
1. Poach the chicken in water until it reaches an internal temperature of 165°F (should take 15-20 minutes or until no longer pink near the bone). Drain the chicken and let it cool.
2. Remove the skin, pull the meat off the bones, and tear into fine shreds.
3. Mix together the shredded chicken, half of the cracker crumbs, mayonnaise, scallions, lemon juice, and salt in a bowl.
4. Form the mixture into 8 patties that are about 1/2 inch thick.
5. Coat the remaining cracker crumbs over the patties.
6. Heat half of the vegetable oil in a non-stick skillet over medium-high heat.
7. Cook the patties for 2-4 minutes on each side, adding more oil if necessary to prevent sticking.
8. Serve and enjoy.
Serves 4.
